content.full_text:
/ 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
July 10, 2014 
Kevin Morrill, Chief 
Office of Medi-Cal Procurement 
Department of Health Care Services (DHCS) 
1501 Capitol Avenue, Suite 71.3041, MS 4200 
Sacramento, CA 95814 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-14-121 
Dear Mr. Morrill, 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions 
of the Political Reform Act. Per your email today, you stated that your office no longer wishes to 
receive written advice. Therefore, your request for advice has been withdrawn. 
ER:jgl 
Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but subsequently withdrew the request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC acknowledged the withdrawal of the advice request per the requestor's email notification that they no longer wished to receive written advice.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no question or conclusion sections. The document contains minimal substantive content, only acknowledging the withdrawal of the request for written advice.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but subsequently withdrew the request.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC acknowledged the withdrawal of the advice request per the requestor's email notification that they no longer wished to receive written advice.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter dated July 10, 2014, in which the FPPC acknowledges that Kevin Morrill of the Department of Health Care Services has withdrawn his request for advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act.
